questions.question_text:
On the occasion of World Health Day, write an article in about 150 words for the school news-letter on the topic, Importance of Physical Health in Our Lives, using the clues given below.
Hints :
Healthy mind lives in a healthy body.
Lack of time for physical activity because of the demands of modem lives.
Ignoring the health increases the risk of many diseases.
Discipline is the key to resolving these concerns.

Due to selfish human activities and overuse of natural resources, global warming is taking place, which poses danger to humankind. Write an article to highlight the effects of global warming. You are Girish Kumar.

Water is one of the most precious gifts of nature. But it is unfortunate that we don't understand its worth and over-exploit this resource for our selfish purposes. It is a matter of serious attention that water must be conserved at all costs. Write an article for your school magazine, urging the fellow students to save water. You are Mohit/Mohita.

Education is a boon to humanity. It builds up our confidence. But it is shocking that in our country a lot of children don't get even basic education. Prepare an article on the topic Need of Education for all. You are Rahul.

You read in the newspaper about a baby girl found abandoned at the railway station. You are touched by the fact that people consider the girl child as a burden and not as an asset. Write an article for a magazine on Saving the Girl Child. You are Neeraj Bhardwaj.

People waste a lot of money on decoration and food during the wedding ceremony. Write an article saying that the money spent unnecessarily on decoration and pomp and show can be spent elsewhere with proper use.

Cruelty to animals is growing day-by-day due to human greed. This is not good for the ecosystem. Animals too are a part of our life. You have been asked to write an article 'Live and Let Live' in order to create awareness towards animals. You are Rohit.

Recently CBSE has introduced a new pattern of assessment of students' performance in schools. This system aims at the overall growth of students personality. Do you think that the students in your class will be comfortable with this system. Write an article on the issue CCE: A way to New Life. You are Ruchi.

Recently CBSE has introduced a new pattern of assessment of students' performance in schools. This system aims at the overall growth of students personality. Do you think this system is comfortable with the students in your class? Write an article on the issue of CCE: A Way to New Education. You are Ruchi.
Write an article in about 180- 200 words on Child Labour.
Drug abuse is a social evil that has ruined many lives and is gradually on the rise. The youth has been affected by it the most. Write an article on the topic of Drug Abuse - A Social Evil.
Terrorism is the biggest and the most dangerous threat to humanity today. Write an article on the topic of Terrorism a Threat to Humanity. You are Balwant Kumar.

The increasing population of our country has led to the shrinking of forest cover. The cutting of the forest causes what is called The Green House Effect. It results in the heating of the earth's surface which has serious consequences. Write an article on the topic 'The Importance of Tree Plantation'.

Cruelty to animals is growing day by day due to human greed. This is not good for the ecosystem. Animals too are a part of our life. You have been asked to write an article Live and Let Live in order to create awareness. You are Rohit.

Water is one of the most precious gifts of nature. But it is unfortunate that we don't understand its worth and overexploit this resource for our selfish purposes. It is a matter of serious concern that water must be conserved at all costs. Write an article for your school magazine, urging the fellow students to save water. You are Mohit/Mohita.
You have seen many children working in glass and other hazardous factories. You are sad to see this. As Jai, write an article for your school magazine.

Education is a boon to humanity. It builds up our confidence. But it is shocking that in our country a lot of children don't get even basic education Prepare an article on the topic Need of Education for All. You are Rahul.
You are Gourav/Shikha. Write an article for the school magazine on the topic Saving our Earth. (150 words)

You happen to go through the notes of a reporter. Modern children are distinctly different. They are intelligent, aware and smart. Parents should adopt a new strategy to guide them. Write an article in 100-120 words for a magazine on the topic of Parenting.
Pollution has become a great problem. It is becoming the cause of many diseases. Write an article on the harmful effects of pollution.

Looking at the increasing obesity among school children write an article on the topic in taking help from the hints given below. You are Ankit Mane.
Hints
The problem of being overweight in common in children.
Sedentary lifestyle of children, watch television, waste time on social networking sites, very little physical exercise.

The increase in the population of our country has led to the shrinking of forest cover. The cutting of the forest causes what is called The Green House Effect. It results in the heating of the earth's surface which has serious consequences. Write an article on the topic The Importance of Tree Plantation. You are Monika.

Education policies in schools today are student friendly. Now, the move is on to do away with school uniforms. Write an article on Uniforms are Essential in Schools using the inputs given and your own ideas.
Write an article to be published in your school magazine expressing your concern over the health hazards caused by fast food in about 150 words.

Parents today are facing a major problem with their children. They waste most of their time on Facebook and other social networking sites, with the result that their studies and other important activities are neglected. Write an article on the Pros and Cons of Social Networking Sites. You are Vinod Kumar.
You have seen many children working in glass and other hazardous factories. You are sad to see this. Write an article for your school magazine giving your views about Child Labour.
